title: the result of the account columns selected is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B ( ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, VALUE1 FLOAT, VALUE2 FLOAT, VALUE3 INTEGER DEFAULT 0 );
INSERT INTO B (ID, VALUE1, VALUE2, VALUE3) VALUES(1, 100.5, -200.75, NULL);
INSERT INTO B (ID, VALUE1, VALUE2, VALUE3) VALUES(2, NULL, 300.25, 1);
SELECT (VALUE1 + VALUE2) AS SUM_RESULT FROM B WHERE VALUE3 IS NULL;
SELECT (VALUE1 - VALUE2) AS RESULT FROM B WHERE VALUE1 > 0;
key_bug_features: Incorrect result from arithmetic operation on selected columns
